query: Route this request through Intermesh, then inspect the current Intermesh AGENTS.md and identify the verification commands required before completion. Do not edit project files and do not run the verification commands; the normal private Intermesh route receipt is allowed.

Route this request through Intermesh, then review the latest commit in the current Intermesh repository for correctness, regressions, and missing tests. Do not edit files or commit anything; read-only commands and the normal private route receipt are allowed.
